## AI-assisted (“vibecoded”) components

A large share of the **Go server**, **web UI**, and related automation was produced with substantial help from AI coding tools. That does **not** mean the code was formally reviewed, security-audited, or certified for production use. Bugs, omissions, and unsafe defaults may exist.

## You assume all risks

**You**, the user, bear **sole responsibility** for:

- Any damage, data loss, incorrect conclusions, operational mistakes, or security incidents arising from running `timedog`, `timedog-server`, or any other file in this repository.
- Verifying outputs against your backups and your environment before acting on them.
- How you expose the HTTP server (local-only vs network), permissions, Full Disk Access, and paths you grant the tool.

**The authors and contributors are not liable** for any direct or indirect consequences of using this software. If you do not accept that, do not use it.

## Not professional advice

Nothing in this repository is legal, security, or backup-architecture advice.
